description: A supplier and cost analytics section within /app/analytics (or as a separate tab) providing performance dashboards for supplier evaluation and cost analysis. Includes supplier scorecards with average lead time, on-time delivery rate, and order fulfillment accuracy. Cost analysis views break down spending by supplier, category, and time period. All report data is exportable as CSV. Admin and Manager roles only. Data sourced from purchase orders, movements, and item cost fields in demo store.

stories.title: Supplier analytics tab on analytics page
stories.description: Add a 'Suppliers' tab to the analytics page (src/routes/app.analytics.tsx) alongside existing Stock Overview and Movement Trends sections. Tab renders a placeholder initially. Uses shadcn Tabs. Tab only visible to Admin/Manager.
acceptanceCriteria: New 'Suppliers' tab added to analytics page
Tab switches content area to supplier analytics
Admin/Manager only visibility
Mobile: tabs scroll horizontally
Component modification under 20 lines added

verification.test: Navigate to /app/analytics. 'Suppliers' tab visible. Click it — content area switches. No console errors.

stories.title: Supplier performance scorecards
stories.description: Create src/components/analytics/SupplierScoreCards.tsx. For each supplier, display a card with: supplier name, total POs, avg lead time (days between PO submitted and fully received), on-time delivery rate (% of POs received by expected date), fulfillment accuracy (% of line items received at ordered qty). Cards in a responsive grid. Color-coded: green ≥90%, amber 70-89%, red <70% for rates. Data computed from PO and movement data in demo store.
acceptanceCriteria: One card per supplier with name and 4 metrics
Avg lead time in days
On-time rate as percentage with color coding
Fulfillment accuracy as percentage with color coding
Total PO count shown
Responsive grid: 3 columns desktop, 1 column mobile
Empty state if no suppliers have POs
Component under 180 lines

verification.test: Navigate to /app/analytics Suppliers tab. Supplier cards render with metrics. Rates are color-coded. Resize to 390px — single column. No console errors.

stories.title: Spending by supplier bar chart
stories.description: Create src/components/analytics/SpendBySupplierChart.tsx. Horizontal bar chart (recharts) showing total spending per supplier (sum of PO line item qty × unit cost for received POs). Sorted by spend descending. Tooltip shows exact amount. Bars use teal gradient. Clicking a bar navigates to supplier detail (/app/suppliers?supplier=ID).
acceptanceCriteria: Horizontal bar chart with one bar per supplier
Sorted by total spend descending
Currency formatting on values
Tooltip with supplier name and exact spend
Bars clickable — navigate to supplier detail
Empty state if no PO data
Responsive width
Component under 120 lines

verification.test: Navigate to /app/analytics Suppliers tab. Bar chart shows suppliers sorted by spend. Hover — tooltip with currency amount. Click a bar — navigates to supplier detail page. No console errors.

stories.title: Cost by category breakdown
stories.description: Create src/components/analytics/CostByCategoryChart.tsx. Donut chart showing total inventory cost (qty × cost) broken down by category. Center shows total cost. Legend with category names and amounts. Tooltip with percentage and amount. Colors from a sequential teal/amber palette. Date range filter from analytics page applies.
acceptanceCriteria: Donut chart with segments per category
Center label shows total inventory cost
Legend with category, amount, percentage
Tooltip on hover with details
Respects date range and other analytics filters
Empty state if no categorized items
Component under 100 lines

verification.test: Navigate to /app/analytics Suppliers tab. Donut chart renders with category segments. Center shows total. Hover segments — tooltip with %. No console errors.

stories.title: Cost trend over time line chart
stories.description: Create src/components/analytics/CostTrendChart.tsx. Line chart showing total spending over time (monthly). Single line showing cumulative or per-period spend based on PO received dates. Optional: toggle between cumulative and per-period views. X-axis: months, Y-axis: currency. Tooltip with month and amount. Uses recharts.
acceptanceCriteria: Line chart with monthly spending data points
Toggle between cumulative and per-period views
X-axis shows months, Y-axis shows currency values
Tooltip with month name and formatted amount
Respects analytics page date range filter
Empty state if no spending data in range
Component under 130 lines

verification.test: Navigate to /app/analytics Suppliers tab. Cost trend chart renders with monthly data. Toggle cumulative/per-period — chart updates. Hover points — tooltip shows amount. Change date range — chart updates. No console errors.

stories.title: Export supplier reports as CSV
stories.description: Add 'Export Supplier Report' button to the Suppliers analytics tab. Generates a CSV with two sections: Supplier Scorecards (one row per supplier with all metrics) and Spending by Category (one row per category with cost). File named 'stackwise-supplier-report-YYYY-MM-DD.csv'. Client-side generation with browser download. Respects current filters.
acceptanceCriteria: Export button on Suppliers tab
CSV includes supplier scorecard data and category cost data
Respects active filters and date range
File named with current date
Loading spinner during generation
Success toast on download
Empty data shows 'No data to export' toast
Utility under 60 lines

verification.test: Navigate to /app/analytics Suppliers tab. Click Export — CSV downloads. Open file — contains supplier rows with metrics and category cost rows. No console errors.
